simple_types.name: Command
simple_types.code:
type Command is (Mode,
                 Matrix_R,
                 Update,
                 Options,
                 Matrix_L,
                 Brightness,
                 Reset)
   with Size => 8;

simple_types.name: Matrix_Modes
simple_types.code:
type Matrix_Modes is (Matrix_8x8, Matrix_7x9, Matrix_6x10, Matrix_5x11)
   with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: Outputs
simple_types.code:
type Outputs is (Matrix_1, Matrix_2, Both)
   with Size => 2;

array_types.name: Display_Matrix
array_types.code: type Display_Matrix is array (Display_Column, Display_Row) of Boolean;

record_types.name: Config_Register

subprograms.name: To_Left_Matrix
subprograms.code:
function To_Left_Matrix
   (DM : Display_Matrix;
    DP : Boolean := False)
   return Matrix_Array

subprograms.name: To_Right_Matrix
subprograms.code:
function To_Right_Matrix
   (DM : Display_Matrix;
    DP : Boolean := False)
   return Matrix_Array

Write_Block_Data
Write_Byte_Data
